==== expandoFunctionAsAssertion.tlua (1 errors) ====
    function example() end
    
    example.isFoo = function(value: string): asserts value is 'foo'
      if value ~= 'foo' then
        throw new Error('Not foo');
                  ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Error'.
      end
    end;
    
    example.isFoo('test');
